title: Parabolic Stop and Reverse Tool
subtitle: Parabolic SAR Reversal Detection with Multi-Bar Confirmation and Gap Validation
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: EXTRACT — multi-bar confirmation window pattern, SAR gap consistency check, pending signal mechanism. SAR itself is a weak standalone trigger but the confirmation architecture is reusable.

core_concept.name: Parabolic SAR Reversal
core_concept.description: SAR = Stop and Reverse. When SAR dots flip from above price to below (or vice versa) after consecutive confirming bars, the tool flags a potential reversal. A 'pending signal mechanism' captures the SAR level and monitors for price confirmation within 3 bars.
core_concept.sar_meaning: SAR dot below price = uptrend (bullish). SAR dot above price = downtrend (bearish). Flip = reversal signal.
buy_conditions: Current SAR dot is below close
Previous 2 bars are bearish with SAR dots ABOVE their closes
Gap between consecutive SAR dots within MaxDotGapPercentage
sell_conditions: Current SAR dot is above close
Previous 2 bars are bullish with SAR dots BELOW their closes
Gap between consecutive SAR dots within MaxDotGapPercentage
core_concept.pending_mechanism: On signal, capture SAR reversal level. Monitor next 3 bars. If price reaches that level = confirmed. If not = warn of possible fake signal.
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: SAR alone is too slow for M1 entry — it lags. However: the multi-bar confirmation window (require N prior bars in prior direction before accepting reversal) is exactly our departure candle concept at a higher level. The gap consistency check is a novel filter we don't have.

SARStep.description: Acceleration factor — how fast SAR accelerates toward price

MinConsecutiveDots.description: Number of prior bars that must confirm the previous trend before reversal is valid

MaxDotGapPercentage.description: Max allowed gap between consecutive SAR dots as % of close price — filters erratic SAR behavior

EnableArrows.description: Draw Wingdings arrow at signal bar

reversal_detection_algorithm.step_1: Compute Parabolic SAR for current + prior bars (step=SARStep, max=SARMaximum)

step_2_buy_check.b: current sar: sar[0] < close[0] (dot below price = bullish SAR)
step_2_buy_check.c: prior N bars: for i in 1..MinConsecutiveDots: close[i] < open[i] AND sar[i] > close[i]
step_2_buy_check.d: gap check: abs(sar[0] - sar[1]) / close[0] <= MaxDotGapPercentage / 100

step_2_sell_check.b: current sar: sar[0] > close[0] (dot above price = bearish SAR)
step_2_sell_check.c: prior N bars: for i in 1..MinConsecutiveDots: close[i] > open[i] AND sar[i] < close[i]
step_2_sell_check.d: gap check: abs(sar[0] - sar[1]) / close[0] <= MaxDotGapPercentage / 100

reversal_detection_algorithm.step_3_pending: Store signal level (SAR value at flip). Monitor next 3 bars for price to reach that level.
reversal_detection_algorithm.step_4_confirm_or_warn: If price reaches stored SAR level within 3 bars: confirmed signal. Else: warn 'possible fake signal'.

steps.name: compute_sar
steps.description: Calculate Parabolic SAR with configured step/max

steps.name: check_prior_trend
steps.description: Verify MinConsecutiveDots bars confirm the prior trend (bearish before buy, bullish before sell)

steps.name: check_current_flip
steps.description: Current bar must show body in new direction AND SAR has flipped sides

steps.name: validate_gap
steps.description: SAR dot spacing must be within MaxDotGapPercentage — filters erratic/noisy SAR

steps.name: pending_monitor
steps.description: Capture SAR reversal level. Over next 3 bars, check if price confirms.

steps.name: alert_or_warn
steps.description: Confirmed: draw arrow + alert. Unconfirmed: warn of fake signal.

sar_formula_notes.acceleration_factor: AF starts at SARStep on first extreme point, increases by SARStep each bar a new EP is set, capped at SARMaximum

default_comparison.this_tool: step=0.1, max=1.0 — 5x more aggressive, faster-moving SAR, more responsive but noisier

sar_formula_notes.sensitivity_note: Higher step = SAR accelerates faster = dots closer to price = more reversals detected but also more noise. Their 0.1/1.0 is very aggressive vs standard 0.02/0.2.

backtesting.verdict: Positive results shown with live examples
backtesting.caveat: Some signals require additional filtering. Larger timeframes recommended to reduce false signals.
backtesting.note: No quantified win rate or pip statistics provided — purely visual backtest.

components_to_build.name: PsarCalculator
components_to_build.note: Standard SAR algorithm — already in ta-lib and pandas_ta. Don't implement from scratch.

components_to_build.name: SarReversalDetector
components_to_build.returns: Signal with direction and pending SAR level
components_to_build.note: The multi-bar confirmation window and gap check are the novel parts.

keep: Multi-bar confirmation window: N prior bars in prior direction before accepting reversal (MinConsecutiveDots)
Gap consistency check: SAR dot spacing as % of price — filters erratic indicator behavior
Pending signal mechanism: capture level, monitor N bars for confirmation
Fake signal warning: explicit timeout if price doesn't reach expected level
discard: SAR as primary entry trigger — too lagging for M1 precision entry
SARStep=0.1, SARMaximum=1.0 — too aggressive; standard 0.02/0.2 is more appropriate
3-bar confirmation window — too short for M15 structure; 5-10 bars on M15 is better
improve: Use SAR as TRAILING SL manager not entry trigger: once in trade, SAR dot = dynamic stop level
Combine SAR flip direction with zone interaction: SAR flips bullish AT demand zone = confluence
Use SAR for position management: trail SL to SAR value after P1 is hit
Normalize gap check: MaxDotGapPercentage in ATR units not % of close (works better across instruments)

creviaderiv_insights.sar_as_trailing_stop: After P1 hit, trail SL to SAR dot value. SAR naturally moves with price acceleration. This adds a dynamic SL that tightens as trend develops — superior to fixed ATR trail.
creviaderiv_insights.multi_bar_confirmation_pattern: MinConsecutiveDots is the same pattern as our departure candle gate — require the condition to hold for N bars, not just flash once. Validates our gate architecture.
creviaderiv_insights.gap_check_novel_filter: SAR dot gap as % of close is a new filter type we don't use. Could generalize: 'indicator value jump % threshold' filter to detect when any indicator behaves erratically.
creviaderiv_insights.pending_mechanism_maps_to_zone_touch: Their pending signal that monitors price reaching a stored level is exactly our zone interaction check: zone has a level, we wait for price to reach it.
